label: 1546 CE
era_summary: Year 1546 (MDXLVI) was a common year starting on Friday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1546: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1546: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Spain-Chile, 1540-61; Spain-Mexico (Maya), 1546. Maddison records GDP/capita 1391 (ESP, 1546) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
